recommendations.title: The Taming of the Scoundrel
recommendations.overview: A rich farmer is well known for being very unkind. He's misanthropic, misogynous and cantankerous. Until he meets by chance a gorgeous girl...

recommendations.title: Special Features: Handsome
recommendations.overview: Forty-something Mattia has every woman in town lusting after him. But every time a woman wants to get hitched, he drags out his 'daughter' (actually the girl next door) to pass judgment on this woman.

recommendations.title: Ace
recommendations.overview: Asso (Ace), the best poker-player in town, was killed in his wedding night, because he won too much against a bad loser. In the "final" game in heaven the clerk on duty also lost, so Asso can come back to this world as a ghost to search for a good ma

recommendations.title: Velvet Hands
recommendations.overview: Engineer Quiller has become rich by selling his completely indestructible shop-window glass to jeweleries around the world. But this got him lots of enemies too: the insurance agencies, who've lost hundreds of customers, and the burglarers. When he t

recommendations.title: Madly in Love
recommendations.overview: Cristina is a rich, spoiled princess visiting Rome with her royal parents. The mission of their visit is to marry her off to a super-wealthy corporate type and thereby start to turn around the losses their small kingdom is experiencing in its casino

recommendations.title: The Country Boy
recommendations.overview: A man is forced to completely change his habits when he decides to move from the country to the city.

recommendations.title: Attila Scourge of God
recommendations.overview: The misadventures of Attila and his band of barbarians as they take up arms against the Roman Empire in their native Milano

recommendations.title: Department Store
recommendations.overview: A series of skits involving customers and store personnel from several departments of the big department store.

recommendations.title: The Green Mile

recommendations.title: The Grumpy
recommendations.overview: Traveling from New York to Italia, pretty Mary rushes into moody macho lawyer Tito. The girl immediately falls for the guy with the gruffy manners and in an very impertinent way, she leans on him as she gets in trouble: Not only that she gets tied up
